title: cyclosorus alanii
intro: Cyclosorus alanii, also known as the Alan's leather fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It is a type of vascular plant that belongs to the division Pteridophyta, characterized by its unique fronds and rhizome growth. The medicinal properties of Cyclosorus alanii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be attributed to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of the plant include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and treat various gastrointestinal issues, with herbal preparations often involving the use of the plant's rhizome and fronds in teas, infusions, and topical applications.
